arts.sum: According to L'Équipe (paywall), Olympique de Marseille (OM) may soon embark on a redesign of its iconic crest.

arts.ttl: Will Chancel Mbemba represent Marseille again?
arts.sum: Chancel Mbemba (30) was spotted training with the Olympique de Marseille first team for the first time this season on Friday morning. The Congolese international had been forced to train…

arts.ttl: FEATURE | Exploring Laurent Blanc’s forgotten past as Montpellier’s goal machine
arts.sum: Laurent Robert Blanc. There are many ways to describe the World Cup-winning France captain. An elegant libero, an inspirational leader, a serial winner. For all his celebrated virtues few would…

arts.ttl: Mason Greenwood expecting second child with partner after summer move to France
arts.sum: Mason Greenwood left Manchester United permanently for Marseille in the summer and the striker has now had some good news off the pitch after a swift start on it for Roberto De Zerbi’s side
